title: Loki’s Shadow Over the Island
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Franky, Luffy as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You ready, bosses?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're almost at the base of the mountain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: OKAY, GRAB ON TIGHT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We're about to go vertical.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Vertical?? but how!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: W-Wait a minute!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Whoa what is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We're going up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah! We forgot to explain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The village is at the top of this tree!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why we're hitching a direct ride on this rainbow!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're holding off on partying till we get there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're explaining the wrong bit! How is RIDIN' a rainbow even possible?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's the ship sailing on?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A rainbow is nothing but a refraction of light through water droplets...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gaba BA BA BA! What are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Rainbows are meant to be crossed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Are you for real?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're really riding it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gaba BA BA BA BA! This tailwind is perfect for Rainbow sailing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rainbow currents don't give any resistance, so even the lightest of rowing will carry you all the way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy and the others are gonna go nuts when they see this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think I've already gone nuts myself, yoho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: DITTO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Amazing, it's a seven- colored sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That sparkling sound is so cute!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world is a never ending chain of wonders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We'll deliver Bink's sake~

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Captains! Do you have straw hat with you!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it isn't hajrubin and Stansen!! I was wondering who's ship that was!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OW! Long time no see!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: CyBORG!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, straw hat and the others are gonna catch up later?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We hunted down a moose for him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoa!! Those are delicious!! I want a bite!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys can have some if there's leftovers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We got it especially for the straw hats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gegya Gya! Have it your way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The bridge between the realm of the dead and the realm of the sun

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ahhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: THE SUNNY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey!! That's our ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're Luffy-Kun, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So cute!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I love you tiny humans!! Oh, but don't take that the wrong way... I'm not like him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just don't go lumping me in with that creep rodo, okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't go around trapping humans in cages!! I just wanna be friends!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GORD!! This isn't the time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oops! Sorry!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 51 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
